title: BARRA SALADA BEACH FRONT LOT
location_text: BARRA SALADA BEACH FRONT LOTFor Sale·Barra Salada, Sonsonate, El SalvadorShareView all photos$ 450,000 NegotiableAvailable todayNo data·No data·2690.79 sqftView all photos$ 450,000 NegotiableAvailable todayListed on Feb 24, 20252690.79m2Ocean frontProperty TypeNo year dataOwned sinceBarra Salada Beach: A Hidden Gem in Western El SalvadorLooking for the perfect spot for a picnic or a relaxing day under the sun? Barra Salada Beach, located in the charming municipality of Sonsonate, is an idyllic destination for those seeking tranquility and natural beauty. With its warm and pleasant climate, this beach invites you to unwind, soak up the sun, and enjoy life’s simple pleasures. Don’t forget to pack your sunscreen, beach chairs, and towels for the ultimate comfort!Know moreBarra Salada’s expansive shoreline ensures plenty of space for everyone, allowing visitors to enjoy their activities without crowding. Whether you’re setting up a soccer match, playing beach volleyball, or trying your hand at sport fishing, this beach offers endless opportunities for fun and relaxation.The beach’s natural landscape is a feast for the eyes, with its pristine environment largely untouched by human intervention. On sunny days, the water displays moderate waves, creating a striking contrast between the intense blue sea and the white foam of the breaking waves. The grayish, wet sand and the presence of stunning estuaries add to its unique charm.Barra Salada is also a fantastic destination for families. Its clean, quiet, and safe environment makes it an excellent choice for a peaceful getaway. The locals take great pride in maintaining the beach’s cleanliness, ensuring a pleasant experience for all visitors.For those seeking adventure, the beach’s vast expanse is perfect for beach sports like volleyball or simply lounging under the sun. Sport fishing enthusiasts will also find Barra Salada to be an ideal spot.While the beach is popular among tourists, it remains relatively uncrowded, offering a sense of exclusivity. Many visitors choose to stay in the nearby ranches or resorts that dot the coastline, adding to the beach’s tranquil vibe.Barra Salada Beach is more than just a destination—it’s an experience. Its natural beauty, friendly locals, and peaceful atmosphere make it the perfect place to disconnect, recharge, and create lasting memories.Contact us today to schedule a showing and take the first step toward owning your piece of paradise in Barra Salada Beach today and discover why it’s one of El Salvador’s best-kept secrets!Features55 minutes driving distance from El Zonte beach1hr20 minutes from El Tunco Town1hr45 hr drive from San Salvador*Note: -This showing may apply a feeListing updated: May 13, 2025Total Views: 952RelacionadoMore Ocean front Homes For SaleCOSTA AZUL BEACH LOTPlaya Costa Azul, Sonsonate, El Salvador--bed·--bath·1604.22m2$399,000  NegotiableRelacionadoLA VENTANA BEACH FRONT LOTLa Ventana beach, Surfcity 2, Usulutan, El Salvador--bed·--bath·1452.69m2$-RelacionadoNearby homes for sale inEl Salvador,SonsonateCERROMAR stage 3 lot #3Cerromar, La Libertad, El Salvador--bed·--bath·--m2$196,742RelacionadoCERROMAR stage 3 lot #2Cerromar, La Libertad, El Salvador--bed·--bath·--m2$246,603RelacionadoCERROMAR stage 3 lot #1Cerromar, La Libertad, El Salvador--bed·--bath·--m2$224,000RelacionadoAtami Lot steps from the Palmarcito BeachAtami, La Libertad, El Salvador--bed·--bath·597m2$121,500RelacionadoSol Y Mar Ocean-view LotSol y Mar, La Libertad, El Salvador--bed·--bath·609.96m2$220,000RelacionadoOcean-view property in El MajahualPlaya Majahual, La Libertad, El Salvador--bed·--bath·1,397.85m2$299,000Relacionado$ 450,000 NegotiableGet pre-qualifiedNo data·No data·2690.79 sqftView all photosRelacionado

title: COSTA AZUL BEACH LOT
location_text: COSTA AZUL BEACH LOTFor Sale·Playa Costa Azul, Sonsonate, El SalvadorShareView all photos$399,000  NegotiableAvailable todayNo data·No data·1604.22  sqftView all photos$399,000  NegotiableAvailable todayListed on Feb 24, 20251604.22 m2Ocean frontProperty TypeNo year dataOwned sinceCosta Azul Beach: A Tropical Paradise in El SalvadorWhen it comes to breathtaking beaches, El Salvador is a hidden gem, and Costa Azul Beach is one of its most enchanting treasures. Located in the municipality of Acajutla, in the Sonsonate district, this expansive tropical paradise offers the perfect escape to enjoy the sun, sand, and the refreshing sea in all its splendor.Know moreJust an hour from the country’s capital, Costa Azul Beach is the ideal destination for a memorable day trip or a unique weekend getaway. Visitors often describe it as a slice of Eden, thanks to its stunning natural landscapes that are nothing short of a visual masterpiece. The warm, calm waters, especially during summer, invite you to relax and unwind.Surrounded by charming reefs, Costa Azul Beach is a haven for water sports enthusiasts. Whether you’re into snorkeling, diving, or simply exploring the vibrant marine life, this beach has it all. Its proximity to San Salvador ensures easy access to various amenities and services, making it a favorite among locals and tourists.For photography lovers, Costa Azul Beach is a dream come true. Every corner of this expansive shoreline is filled with picturesque details, from the golden sands to the crystal-clear waters and the captivating reefs. It’s the perfect backdrop for capturing unforgettable moments.During the summer months, guided diving tours are available, offering a chance to explore the rich marine biodiversity that thrives in the surrounding waters. Time seems to stand still as you encounter a variety of colorful marine species.On land, the beach’s vast stretches of sand are perfect for sunbathing, beach games, and sports, making it a delightful destination for adults and children. Whether you’re seeking adventure or relaxation, Costa Azul Beach has something for everyone.Undoubtedly, Costa Azul Beach is an exceptional destination for a family vacation. This natural jewel of El Salvador offers the perfect blend of pristine landscapes and serene beauty, allowing you to reconnect with nature and create lasting memories.Discover the magic of Costa Azul Beach—a place where the sea, sand, and sun come together to create an unforgettable experience.Contact us today to schedule a showing and take the first step toward owning your own piece of paradise.Features100 meters from the famous river mouth of Costa Azul1hr30 minutes driving distance from El Zonte beach1hr40 minutes from El Tunco Town1 hr drive from San Salvador*Note: -This showing may apply a feeListing updated: May 13, 2025Total Views: 1.914RelacionadoMore Ocean front Homes For SaleBARRA SALADA BEACH FRONT LOTBarra Salada, Sonsonate, El Salvador--bed·--bath·2690.79m2$ 450,000 NegotiableRelacionadoLA VENTANA BEACH FRONT LOTLa Ventana beach, Surfcity 2, Usulutan, El Salvador--bed·--bath·1452.69m2$-RelacionadoNearby homes for sale inEl Salvador,SonsonateCERROMAR stage 3 lot #3Cerromar, La Libertad, El Salvador--bed·--bath·--m2$196,742RelacionadoCERROMAR stage 3 lot #2Cerromar, La Libertad, El Salvador--bed·--bath·--m2$246,603RelacionadoCERROMAR stage 3 lot #1Cerromar, La Libertad, El Salvador--bed·--bath·--m2$224,000RelacionadoAtami Lot steps from the Palmarcito BeachAtami, La Libertad, El Salvador--bed·--bath·597m2$121,500RelacionadoSol Y Mar Ocean-view LotSol y Mar, La Libertad, El Salvador--bed·--bath·609.96m2$220,000RelacionadoOcean-view property in El MajahualPlaya Majahual, La Libertad, El Salvador--bed·--bath·1,397.85m2$299,000Relacionado$399,000  NegotiableGet pre-qualifiedNo data·No data·1604.22  sqftView all photosRelacionado
